    def test_eval_text_outputs_sorted(
        entrypoint_argv: list[str],
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        path = write_circ(
            tmp_path,
            "basic.circ",
            """\
            input b a
            output y x
            wire t1
    
            t1 = AND(a, b)
            x = NOT(t1)
            y = BUF(t1)
            """,

            entrypoint_argv,
            ["eval", str(path), "--set", "a=1", "--set", "b=1"],
        )
